sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116300" key="w(raiopole/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὡραιο-πολέω</orth>, <sense id="n116300.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">live with the young,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>:—but cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὡραπολεῖν.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
